creator: freebsd@quinteiro.org
text:
I'll have to look into how to get a crash dump.

Problem goes away if I load the drm-devel-kmod on 14-CURRENT. Laptop doesn't power off or reboot if I touch the touchpad even before I start X.

I'm currently working around troubles with the USB Ethernet adapter I'm using that I suspect are not specific to Freebsd. I've ordered some replacements, but they haven't arrived yet.
